title: epiphyllum oxypetalum
intro: Epiphyllum oxypetalum, also known as the Queen of the Night, is a species of flowering epiphyte that belongs to the cactus family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can be attributed to the presence of flavonoids and other compounds. The health benefits of Epiphyllum oxypetalum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and even help manage diabetes. The herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and potential interactions.
